product.name: Tubi Copilot
product.tagline: AI-powered desktop assistant for every role — Dev, QA, BA, PM, HR and more
product.description: Tubi Copilot is a standalone desktop application that brings AI-powered assistance to every role in your team. Whether you're writing code, creating test cases, drafting requirements, managing projects, or handling HR tasks — Tubi Copilot adapts to your workflow.

features.title: Multi-Role Support
features.description: Switch between specialized modes for Developer, QA, BA, PM, HR and more — each role comes with tailored prompts, tools, and workflows.

features.title: Smart Chat Assistant
features.description: Interact with a context-aware AI assistant that understands your task and helps you generate content, analyze data, and solve problems efficiently.

features.title: Context Attachments
features.description: Attach files, images, or documents directly into your conversation for precise, context-aware answers tailored to your needs.

features.title: Agent Modes
features.description: Switch between Ask, Plan, and Execute modes to adapt the assistant to your current task — from quick Q&A to full automated actions.

features.title: Conversation History
features.description: All your conversations are saved and accessible from the history panel, so you can revisit and continue any previous session.

features.title: Secure by Design
features.description: Authentication uses OAuth2 with PKCE. Your credentials are stored securely in the OS keychain — never in plain text files.

releases.highlights: Major Release — Chuyển đổi hoàn toàn từ IntelliJ Plugin sang ứng dụng Desktop độc lập (không cần IDE, không cần JDK). Giao diện FlatLaf hiện đại, quản lý Project/Session qua Sidebar, tab Workspace duyệt file, hệ thống Log với file rotation, bảo vệ source code bằng ProGuard, responsive chat bubbles, và build đa nền tảng (Windows/macOS/Linux).
Bug fix — Sửa lỗi NPE khi render Markdown HTML (CSS3 không tương thích Swing); thêm thông báo kiểm tra phiên bản mới khi khởi động plugin.
Major upgrade — Tái kiến trúc Strategy Pattern; Agent Loop 13 tools; SQLite history per-project; @mention bundle; đính kèm hình ảnh; giao diện GitHub Copilot-style.
Initial release — Ask, Plan, Execute modes; OAuth2 login; conversation history.
